untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle requires multi-phase pattern recognition: (1) U-shaped cup formation over weeks with symmetrical edges—requires tracking swing lows/highs over extended period not captured by single-bar indicators; (2) handle as specific 1-2 week downward correction within upper half—requires temporal sequencing and relative positioning logic beyond available indicators; (3) 10-15% drop measurement within handle phase—requires hierarchical price level tracking. The pattern's core logic depends on identifying multi-week structural formations (cup depth, handle placement relative to cup) which cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicator values. Approximated entry conditions based on breakout above 20-day high on volume with price above 200-day MA, but this significantly reduces pattern fidelity.
